description: Shows the Least Common Multiple (LCM) using prime factor bars. Requires two or more primefactor variable references. Standalone expression with at() positioning. Leaf nodes are highlighted with an orange stroke for emphasis.
utility: Visualize LCM using prime factor bars

arguments.name: factors
arguments.description: Two or more primefactor variable references

examples.expression:
P1 = primefactor(at(4,4), 12)
P2 = primefactor(at(4,10), 18)
L = lcmbar(at(10,4), P1, P2)

P1 = primefactor(at(4,4), 8)
P2 = primefactor(at(4,10), 12)
P3 = primefactor(at(4,16), 15)
L = lcmbar(at(10,4), P1, P2, P3)
